understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) by navigating the grid using horizontal moves and gravity falls, while avoiding lethal spikes (u/v).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player moves left/right; after each move gravity pulls them downward until landing on a solid tile, spike, or goal. Clicking removes breakable blocks (x) to open fall paths. Undo reverts the last action. Each level has limited turns and attempts; the goal is to find a safe path to the bottom.
